title: EMA and Callback Lifecycle

CallBackGroup.key_method: __getattr__(method_name: str) -> Callable — loops self._callbacks and calls method_name on each
CallBackGroup.role: Dispatcher: fans out each hook call to all registered Callback instances

Callback.role: Base class; all hooks are no-ops by default

EMAModelCallback.on_train_start: if model.config.ema.enabled: cast model.ema to float32; assert model.ema exists

IterationLoggerCallback.on_training_step_end: @rank0_only — accumulates elapsed time; every logging_iter iterations logs: iteration, avg_iter_time, total_loss

FastEmaModelUpdater.role: Stateless EMA updater (no registered buffers); works with FSDP
FastEmaModelUpdater.update_average: update_average(src_model, tgt_model, beta=0.9999) — _foreach_mul_(tgt, beta) + _foreach_add_(tgt, src, alpha=1-beta)
FastEmaModelUpdater.copy_to: copy_to(src_model, tgt_model) — copies src params into tgt
FastEmaModelUpdater.cache: cache(parameters, is_cpu) — clones params to cpu/cuda; sets is_cached=True
FastEmaModelUpdater.restore: restore(parameters) — copies collected_params back; clears cache

EMAModelTracker.role: Stateful EMA tracker — registers EMA weights as buffers (param names with '.' replaced by '-')
EMAModelTracker.update_average: update_average(model, iteration) — same _foreach logic using registered buffers
EMAModelTracker.copy_to: copy_to(model) — copies buffer data into model parameters
EMAModelTracker.factory: initialize_multi_rank_ema(model, rate, num, enabled) — assigns different beta per DP rank

PowerEMATracker.update_average: Computes iteration-dependent beta = (1-1/i)^(exp+1) before delegating to super()

interaction_flow: CallBackGroup → EMAModelCallback.on_train_start: cast model.ema to float32 (if ema.enabled)
Trainer → CallBackGroup.on_training_step_end(model, data_batch, output_batch, loss, iteration)
CallBackGroup → IterationLoggerCallback.on_training_step_end: accumulate elapsed time; log every logging_iter iters [rank0]
Trainer → validate inner loop: on_validation_step_start → model.validation_step → on_validation_step_end
key_relationships: CallBackGroup composes list[Callback] — instantiated from config via lazy_config.instantiate()
CallBackGroup.__getattr__ dispatches any hook to all callbacks via multi_callback_wrapper
EMAModelCallback extends Callback — holds no state, delegates to model.ema (FastEmaModelUpdater or EMAModelTracker)
GradClipCallback extends Callback — stateful: grad_clip_norm float
IterationLoggerCallback extends Callback — stateful: start_iteration_time, elapsed_iteration_time
FastEmaModelUpdater: standalone updater (not nn.Module); preferred for FSDP
EMAModelTracker extends torch.nn.Module: EMA buffers stored in module state dict
PowerEMATracker extends EMAModelTracker: iteration-dependent beta following EDM2 schedule
Trainer owns CallBackGroup, invokes hooks around each training phase boundary
ema_scope() context manager: cache → copy_to (switch to EMA) → yield → restore (switch back)
important_notes: EMA update (beta=0.9999 default): tgt = beta*tgt + (1-beta)*src using torch._foreach fused ops
GradClipCallback must call grad_scaler.unscale_ before clip_grad_norm_; operates on model_ddp.module
IterationLoggerCallback is @rank0_only decorated — only runs on rank 0
CallBackGroup sets _callback.config and _callback.trainer after instantiation (deprecated path)
Validation uses ema_scope to temporarily swap in EMA weights without disturbing optimizer state
EMAModelTracker.initialize_multi_rank_ema assigns different decay rates per DP rank for multi-EMA training
PowerEMATracker implements EDM2-style schedule: beta = (1-1/i)^(exp+1), exp derived from s parameter
